text.title: Meta Audience Targeting (Granular) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: verify-tier-strategy
step.action: Confirm tier strategy applied; granular layer is downstream.
step.decision-gate: If tier missing, route to ads-meta-targeting first.

step.name: apply-advantage-plus-gate
step.action: Enable Advantage+ only when budget ≥$100/day + broad appeal.

step.name: fill-exclusion-matrix
step.action: Per-stage exclusions: TOFU = current + recent converters; MOFU = purchasers 30d; BOFU = converters 7d.
